summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema Gestao TJ. All requirements successfully implemented and working. Frontend is 100% compliant with all specifications: no Vendas/Pedidos in navigation, Products table has only 'Custo' column (no 'Venda'), Inventory has working 'baixa' functionality, Reports has 3 correct tabs, Alerts has 3 tabs, all content in Portuguese. Backend APIs working at 86% with expected failures for removed Sales/Orders endpoints.

expected_failures.impact: Expected behavior - Sales/Vendas functionality removed per requirements
Expected behavior - Orders/Pedidos functionality removed per requirements
Expected behavior - Cash flow removed from reports per requirements

mocked_integrations.impact: Expected behavior - LLM integration is MOCKED

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@gestaotj.com / Admin@123456 working perfectly
Dashboard loads correctly with Portuguese content
Navigation menu correctly excludes Vendas and Pedidos
Products page: NO 'Venda' column, only 'Custo' column as required
Warehouses page accessible and functional
Inventory page: 'Baixa de Estoque' functionality working with modal confirmation
Invoices page loads and functions correctly
Reports page has exactly 3 tabs: DRE, Curva ABC, Giro de Estoque (NO cash flow)
Alerts page has 3 tabs: Caixa de Entrada, Configurações, Estoque Mínimo
Audit page with Portuguese labels (Criar, Atualizar, Excluir)
Users page loads without crash and shows user management
Guide page has detailed content with 63+ elements
All content properly displayed in Portuguese
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
All backend CRUD operations working correctly
Authentication and authorization working for all user roles
Dashboard statistics API working
Audit logs working with proper filtering
Alert configurations working
Notifications system working
Report exports (PDF/Excel) working
translate=no attribute preventing Google Translate issues
